# VA Horizon

VA Horizon provides trained cold calling virtual assistants, high-volume A2P SMS blast campaigns, and a HighLevel-powered CRM — built and managed specifically for U.S. real estate wholesalers. Clients go live in 48–72 hours.

## Key Facts

- Cold calling VAs are accent-neutral and trained on wholesaling scripts before their first dial
- Every engagement includes a fully configured HighLevel CRM: pipeline stages, SMS automation, VA assignment rules, and reporting dashboards
- SMS blast campaigns are A2P compliant via The Campaign Registry (TCR)
- 5-day replacement guarantee for any underperforming VA
- Pricing starts at $1,000/month per VA; CRM buildout included with service plans
- Proven results: 18% to 92% inbound answer rate; 1 to 4 deals/month; 21 to 6 day average dispo; $45k to $180k pipeline value

## Services

- [Cold Calling VAs](https://www.vahorizon.site/services/cold-calling/): Accent-neutral callers trained on wholesaling scripts — 200+ daily dials, weekly QA, 5-day replacement guarantee
- [SMS Blast & Automations](https://www.vahorizon.site/ai-automations/): A2P-compliant high-volume SMS to seller lists with automated HighLevel follow-up sequences
- [HighLevel CRM — Built & Managed](https://www.vahorizon.site/crm/): Full pipeline, SMS sequences, VA views, and reporting — configured for wholesaling from day one
- [Real Estate Wholesaling VA System](https://www.vahorizon.site/industries/real-estate/): Cold calling, SMS, and CRM in one managed engagement

## Case Studies

- [From Missed Leads to 4x ROI](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/lead-manager-roi/): Phoenix wholesaler — ROI 1.5x to 4x in 60 days, same list spend
- [Scaling Outbound: 1 to 4 Deals/Month](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/scaling-outbound/): Dallas wholesaler — scaled to 4 VA team, 800+ daily dials, zero turnover in 6 months
- [HighLevel CRM Buildout: $45k to $180k Pipeline](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/highlevel-crm-buildout/): Houston wholesaler — $135k in dormant pipeline uncovered after CRM rebuild
- [Dispo Follow-Up: 21 Days to 6 Days](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/dispo-follow-up/): Tampa wholesaler — 71% reduction in contract disposition time, 2x monthly closings
- [Speed to Lead: 18% to 92% Answer Rate](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/speed-to-lead/): Columbus wholesaler — 92% inbound capture with live VA + 60-second SMS autoresponder
- [VA Replacement in 5 Days: 12% to 28% Close Rate](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/va-replacement/): Memphis wholesaler — appointment close rate doubled after replacing underperforming caller

## Blog / Guides

- [How to Hire a Cold Calling VA for Real Estate Wholesaling (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/blog/how-to-hire-cold-calling-va-real-estate-wholesaling/): Scripts, pay rates, red flags, QA process, agency vs. freelance comparison
- [HighLevel CRM Setup Guide for Real Estate Wholesalers (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/blog/highlevel-crm-setup-guide-real-estate-wholesalers/): Pipeline architecture, SMS automation, A2P compliance, VA views, reporting dashboards

## About

- [About VA Horizon](https://www.vahorizon.site/about/): Founder and company overview
- Founder: Youssef Abi-Fadel — https://www.linkedin.com/in/youssef-ahmed-255966380/

## Target Customer

U.S.-based real estate wholesalers doing 1–10 deals/month who want to scale outbound without building an in-house team. Cold calling volume, SMS follow-up, and CRM discipline handled by VA Horizon.
